---
title: "PREVENT-AD Demographic Summary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(stringr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

predictors <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH, "PREVENTAD_longitudinal.rds"))
mci_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_MCI.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_raw.rds"))
```

# Baseline participant characteristics stratified by progression to MCI
```{r}
# Get MCI status for each participant
mci_status <- mci_dat %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  slice_tail() %>%
  select(CONP_ID, RC_MCI) %>%
  mutate(RC_MCI = factor(
    if_else(RC_MCI == 0, "Remained CN", "Progressed to MCI"),
    levels = c("Remained CN", "Progressed to MCI")
  ))

# Get MCI onset date for those who progressed
mci_onset <- mci_dat %>%
  filter(RC_MCI == 1) %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  slice_head() %>%
  select(CONP_ID, mci_onset_date = Date)

# Calculate biomarker summary statistics per participant
biomarker_summary <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    n_biomarker_visits = n(),
    baseline_date = first(Date_taken),
    last_date = last(Date_taken),
    years_followup = interval(ym(first(Date_taken)), ym(last(Date_taken))) / years(1),
    # Mean biomarker values (using renamed column names from longitudinal data)
    ab_ratio_mean = mean(ab_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    gfap_mean = mean(gfap, na.rm = TRUE),
    nfl_mean = mean(nfl, na.rm = TRUE),
    ptau181_mean = mean(ptau181, na.rm = TRUE),
    ptau217_mean = mean(ptau217, na.rm = TRUE),
    ptau217_ab42_ratio_mean = mean(ptau217_ab42_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(mci_onset, by = "CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    years_to_mci = if_else(
      !is.na(mci_onset_date),
      interval(ym(baseline_date), ym(mci_onset_date)) / years(1),
      NA_real_
    )
  )

# Build the table data
table1_data <- predictors %>%
  left_join(
    (PREVENTAD_dat$demographics %>%
       select(CONP_ID, Ethnicity)),
    by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(mci_status, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(biomarker_summary, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    Ethnicity = str_to_sentence(Ethnicity),
    # Convert sex and ethnicity to binary for single-row display
    female = if_else(sex == "Female", 1, 0),
    caucasian = if_else(Ethnicity == "Caucasian", 1, 0)
  ) %>%
  select(-CONP_ID, -baseline_date, -last_date, -mci_onset_date, -sex, -Ethnicity)

# Reorder columns for proper grouping in table
table1_data_ordered <- table1_data %>%
  select(
    # Demographics
    age, female, educ, caucasian,
    # Risk Scores
    apoe, score_cogd, score_libra2, family_history,
    # Biomarkers
    n_biomarker_visits, years_followup, years_to_mci,
    ab_ratio_mean, gfap_mean, nfl_mean, ptau181_mean, ptau217_mean, ptau217_ab42_ratio_mean,
    # Grouping variable
    RC_MCI
  )

table1_gtsummary <- table1_data_ordered %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = RC_MCI,
    type = list(
      n_biomarker_visits ~ "continuous",
      female ~ "dichotomous",
      caucasian ~ "dichotomous"
    ),
    label = list(
      age = "Age (years)",
      female = "Female",
      educ = "Years of education",
      caucasian = "Caucasian",
      apoe = "APOE category",
      score_cogd = "CogDrisk score",
      score_libra2 = "LIBRA2 score",
      family_history = "Family history",
      n_biomarker_visits = "Number of biomarker visits",
      years_followup = "Years of biomarker follow-up",
      years_to_mci = "Years from baseline to MCI onset",
      ab_ratio_mean = "Aβ42/Aβ40 ratio",
      gfap_mean = "GFAP (pg/mL)",
      nfl_mean = "NfL (pg/mL)",
      ptau181_mean = "p-tau181 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217_mean = "p-tau217 (pg/mL)",
      ptau217_ab42_ratio_mean = "p-tau217/Aβ42 ratio"
    ),
    statistic = list(
      all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd}) [{min}-{max}]",
      all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"
    ),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  modify_table_body(
    ~.x %>%
      mutate(
        grouping = case_when(
          variable %in% c("age", "female", "educ", "caucasian") ~ "Demographics",
          variable %in% c("apoe", "score_cogd", "score_libra2", "family_history") ~ "Risk Scores",
          variable %in% c("n_biomarker_visits", "years_followup", "years_to_mci",
                          "ab_ratio_mean", "gfap_mean", "nfl_mean",
                          "ptau181_mean", "ptau217_mean", "ptau217_ab42_ratio_mean") ~ "Biomarkers",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        ),
        # Clear years_to_mci for Remained CN column (should be NA/empty)
        stat_1 = if_else(variable == "years_to_mci", "—", stat_1)
      )
  ) %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Mean (SD) [Range] for continuous; n (%) for categorical") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_levels()

# Convert to gt and add row groups using the grouping column
table1_gt <- table1_gtsummary %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Biomarkers**"),
    rows = grouping == "Biomarkers"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Risk Scores**"),
    rows = grouping == "Risk Scores"
  ) %>%
  tab_row_group(
    label = md("**Demographics**"),
    rows = grouping == "Demographics"
  ) %>%
  row_group_order(groups = c("**Demographics**", "**Risk Scores**", "**Biomarkers**")) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                 cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  ) %>%
  cols_hide(columns = any_of(c("variable", "grouping", "row_type")))

table1_gt

# gtsave(table1_gt, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "PREVENTAD_baseline_characteristics.png"))
```
